var_def: Name of the Indian state or union territory (32 regions); source column region in ntl/india32_ntl_percapita_1992.csv (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Region

var_def: Sum of corrected DMSP-OLS (CCNL v1) nighttime luminosity over the region in 1992, computed in Google Earth Engine at the sensor's native scale; source column sum_ntl in ntl/india32_ntl_percapita_1992.csv (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Total NTL

var_def: Total population of the region in 1992 from the GlobPOP gridded population dataset, aggregated in Google Earth Engine; source column sum_pop in ntl/india32_ntl_percapita_1992.csv (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Population

var_def: Nighttime luminosity per million inhabitants in 1992 (ntl_sum divided by population in millions); source column ntl_pc in ntl/india32_ntl_percapita_1992.csv (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: NTL per capita

var_def: Natural log of nighttime luminosity per capita in 1992; source column ln_ntl_pc in ntl/india32_ntl_percapita_1992.csv (quarcs-lab/project2025s-py).
label: Log NTL per capita
